case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS AGUILAR,CELESTINA C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $960.55 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR,CELESTINA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
